scripts.dev: NEXT_DIST_DIR=.next-dev npm run clean && NEXT_DIST_DIR=.next-dev next dev --turbopack
scripts.dev:clean: NEXT_DIST_DIR=.next-dev npm run clean && NEXT_DIST_DIR=.next-dev next dev --turbopack
scripts.build: NEXT_DIST_DIR=.next-build npm run clean && NEXT_DIST_DIR=.next-build node scripts/run_next_with_server_chunk_fix.js build
scripts.build:clean: NEXT_DIST_DIR=.next-build npm run clean && NEXT_DIST_DIR=.next-build node scripts/run_next_with_server_chunk_fix.js build
